trans-unit.source: Installation failed, please try again. If it doesn't help, restart the machine.
trans-unit.target: Installation failed, please try again. If it doesn't help, restart the machine.

trans-unit.source: Uninstallation completed, please restart the machine.
trans-unit.target: Uninstallation completed, please restart the machine.

trans-unit.source: Do you really want to Exit?
trans-unit.target: Do you really want to Exit?

trans-unit.source: Do you really want to Power Off?
trans-unit.target: Do you really want to Power Off?

trans-unit.source: Do you really want to Logout?
trans-unit.target: Do you really want to Logout?

trans-unit.source: Login request exipred, please try again.
trans-unit.target: Login request exipred, please try again.

trans-unit.source: Not enough balance, please top up and try again.
trans-unit.target: Not enough balance, please top up and try again.

trans-unit.source: Session rate has already changed, please cancel and try again.
trans-unit.target: Session rate has already changed, please cancel and try again.

trans-unit.source: Sorry, there's already a running session in this station.
trans-unit.target: Sorry, there's already a running session in this station.

trans-unit.source: Sorry, you're in session somewhere else.
trans-unit.target: Sorry, you're in session somewhere else.

trans-unit.source: Enter Pin to access system management
trans-unit.target: Enter Pin to access system management

trans-unit.source: Sorry, you are not a member yet. Please finish the Registration
trans-unit.target: Sorry, you are not a member yet. Please finish the Registration

trans-unit.source: Software is already up to date
trans-unit.target: Software is already up to date

trans-unit.source: New version available, proceed to download?
trans-unit.target: New version available, proceed to download?

trans-unit.source: Unexpected error occurred, please check the logs.
trans-unit.target: Unexpected error occurred, please check the logs.

trans-unit.source: Checking updates might take a while to complete.
trans-unit.target: Checking updates might take a while to complete.

trans-unit.source: Updating process did not finish, please try it again.
trans-unit.target: Updating process did not finish, please try it again.

trans-unit.source: Updating might take a while to complete.
trans-unit.target: Updating might take a while to complete.

trans-unit.source: Update complete, please restart the software to apply the new version.
trans-unit.target: Update complete, please restart the software to apply the new version.

trans-unit.source: Auto logout due to user is blocked.
trans-unit.target: Auto logout due to user is blocked.

trans-unit.source: Auto logout due to internet problems.
trans-unit.target: Auto logout due to internet problems.

trans-unit.source: Software is out of date, please update to the latest version.
trans-unit.target: Software is out of date, please update to the latest version.

trans-unit.source: No license deployed to this station. Run the configuration.
trans-unit.target: No license deployed on this station. Run the configuration.

trans-unit.source: License is not registered in the system.
trans-unit.target: License is not known in the system. Please contact the support to verify your license.

trans-unit.source: License is not yet linked to an Account.
trans-unit.target: License is not linked to any Account.

trans-unit.source: License has been revoked. Please contact the support
trans-unit.target: License has been revoked. Please contact the Support

trans-unit.source: License is suspended. Please contact the support
trans-unit.target: License is suspended. Please contact the Support

trans-unit.source: Do you really want to logout?
Are you sure to reset statistics data?
trans-unit.target: Are you sure to reset statistics data?

trans-unit.source: Are you sure to start a VR application in Screen mode?
trans-unit.target: Are you sure to start a VR application in Screen mode?

trans-unit.source: Are you sure to start a non-VR application in VR mode?
trans-unit.target: Are you sure to start a non-VR application in VR mode?

trans-unit.source: Scan the QR Code to Start
trans-unit.target: Scan the QR Code to Start

trans-unit.source: Open mode is not allowed on this station. Please verify your settings.
trans-unit.target: Open mode is not allowed on this station. Please verify your settings.

trans-unit.source: Last login intention ended unexpectedly, please wait for the server to handle it.
trans-unit.target: Last login intention ended unexpectedly, please wait for the server to handle it.

trans-unit.source: There an session already running. Abandoned Sessions will end after a short while.
trans-unit.target: There an session already running. Abandoned Sessions will end after a short while.

trans-unit.source: There is an unknown error, please try again later.
trans-unit.target: There is an unknown error, please try again later.

trans-unit.source: Select an option to start with
trans-unit.target: Select an option to start with

trans-unit.source: Please select your license files to continue.
trans-unit.target: Please select your license files to continue.

trans-unit.source: Starts the Application automatically when you Login into Windows
trans-unit.target: Starts the Application automatically when you Login into Windows

trans-unit.source: Disables the Windows Dialog when an Application Crashes. This Error Dialog can prevent the software from detecting when an Application Ended
trans-unit.target: Disables the Windows Dialog when an Application Crashes. This Error Dialog can prevent the software from detecting when an Application Ended

trans-unit.source: Change of Windows Defender Excluded Folders
trans-unit.target: Change of Windows Defender Excluded Folders

trans-unit.source: Changes the Windows Defender Exclusion Settings for the Storage Folder. This can prevent game corruption in case of false positives from WD, but also expose the System to a higer risk of infections.
trans-unit.target: Changes the Windows Defender Exclusion Settings for the Storage Folder. This can prevent game corruption in case of false positives from WD, but also expose the System to a higer risk of infections.

trans-unit.source: The Language that is selected when the Software starts or it reverts after a Logout.
trans-unit.target: The Language that is selected when the Software starts or it reverts after a Logout.

trans-unit.source: Fill out the Form and Enter your License Key for Activation
trans-unit.target: Fill out the Form and Enter your License Key for Activation

trans-unit.source: Learn more about Content Creation and Business Functions on our Website
trans-unit.target: Learn more about Content Creation and Business Functions on our Website

trans-unit.source: Unknown error, please try again later.
trans-unit.target: Unknown error, please try again later.

trans-unit.source: Are you really sure you want to delete the account?
trans-unit.target: Are you really sure you want to delete the account?

trans-unit.source: A display name for one executable instruction that infers what's it about
trans-unit.target: A display name for one executable instruction that infers what's it about

trans-unit.source: Parameters that will be provided to the main executable when execution of the game is requested.
trans-unit.target: Parameters that will be provided to the main executable when execution of the game is requested.

trans-unit.source: Indicates whether this executable is one of the executables taken into consideration to check if the application is running. Normally an application requires at least one main executable. Multiple main executables mean any of them running will the application be considered as running.
trans-unit.target: Indicates whether this executable is one of the executables taken into consideration to check if the application is running. Normally an application requires at least one main executable. Multiple main executables mean any of them running will the application be considered as running.

trans-unit.source: Indicates whether this process should be killed when the system detects it is not responding
trans-unit.target: Indicates whether this process should be killed when the system detects it is not responding

trans-unit.source: Indicates whether this process should be killed on application exit
trans-unit.target: Indicates whether this process should be killed on application exit

trans-unit.source: The path to the applixcation main executable file. Usually it is the application executable itself, for some applications requiring an external launcher this should be set the path to the launcher executable file.
trans-unit.target: The path to the applixcation main executable file. Usually it is the application executable itself, for some applications requiring an external launcher this should be set the path to the launcher executable file.

trans-unit.source: Specify the corresponding vr module to match the correct graphic api.
trans-unit.target: Specify the corresponding vr module to match the correct graphic api.

trans-unit.source: Working directory of a specific executable. If not set, working directory will be set to the directory where the executable is
trans-unit.target: Working directory of a specific executable. If not set, working directory will be set to the directory where the executable is

trans-unit.source: None of added executables is marked as main executable, are you sure to continue?
trans-unit.target: None of added executables is marked as main executable, are you sure to continue?

trans-unit.source: This file is not a VBox File!
trans-unit.target: This file is not a VBox File!

trans-unit.source: Restart Vr Driver after each App
trans-unit.target: Restart Vr Driver after each App

trans-unit.source: There were some Problems during execution of the Tasks
trans-unit.target: There were some Problems during execution of the Tasks

trans-unit.source: Your storage directory is not empty and you will need to move all your contents manually to the new destination
trans-unit.target: Your storage directory is not empty and you will need to move all your contents manually to the new destination

trans-unit.source: Your storage directory is not empty, it's recommended to use a dedicated directory as your game directory
trans-unit.target: Your storage directory is not empty, it's recommended to use a dedicated directory as your game directory

trans-unit.source: Sorry there is no Execution Option availible! Please check if you have any configured and that your system meets the requirements.
trans-unit.target: Sorry there is no Execution Option availible! Please check if you have any configured and that your system meets the requirements.

trans-unit.source: The Username Password combination is invalid
trans-unit.target: The Username Password combination is invalid

trans-unit.source: Can not connect to Server. Please try again later.
trans-unit.target: Can not connect to Server. Please try again later.
